What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing a blue and white cycling jersey and purple gloves stands in a workshop. A grey mountain bike is mounted on a black repair stand to his left. A wooden workbench holding a white helmet and open black tool case sits to his right. The man holds various tools and adjusts the bicycle handlebars during the sequence.

Describe the sequence of visual elements and actions presented in the first 20 seconds of the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a title card reads ADJUST MECHANICAL DISC BRAKES; at 6s, a man in a blue jersey stands next to a bike; at 12s, the man holds a small black tool in his gloved hand; at 14s, the man displays a silver multi-tool; at 16s, hands rotate a ribbed silver object.
